behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert specific attribute names `slime_router_pd_disaggregation` and `disable_circuit_breaker` on router_args, but instruction.md never mentions these exact attribute names — the agent must guess them.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bugs (crash on assertion, circuit breaker killing workers) without specifying exact attribute names or code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests require specific attribute names `slime_router_pd_disaggregation` (test_slime_router_pd_flag_set) and `disable_circuit_breaker` (test_circuit_breaker_disabled_with_pd); a correct alternative fix using different attribute names (e.g., `pd_disaggregation` or `slime_pd_mode`) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract and exec the _start_router function via subprocess and inspect behavior of router_args attributes.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require the assertion to be removed AND specific attributes to be set to True; a stub would fail the crash test or attribute checks.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both bugs described in instruction.md (crash fix and circuit breaker disable) are covered by behavioral tests plus regression tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under clear section comments (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass regression, repo_tests) with descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in paths or identifiers.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at the function and line range but doesn't leak exact fix details.
